Document:
# Station Pets
Station pets are friendly ghost roles. You are not an antagonist and have no objectives beyond living your best life aboard the station.
As a pet you are expected to act in character for the type of animal you are. You can be interacted with by crew, picked up, carried around, and generally treated as a station mascot.
You have [bold]no assigned objectives[/bold] and are [bold]not expected to cause harm[/bold].
## Station Pets
- [bold]Hamlet[/bold]: the station's resident hamster. Small, grumpy, and beloved. - [bold]Smile[/bold]: a rainbow slime that has been through thousands of experiments and come out the other side sweet-natured. - [bold]Pun Pun[/bold]: a monkey with unlimited access to alcohol. Works at the bar and has elevated status as pseudo-crew. - [bold]Willow[/bold]: a boxing kangaroo. Feisty but friendly.
